title: Wonder SMP Modpack
description: The official Modpack to the minecraft Wonder SMP server!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65560777ccffedfd757fb4389af3bac73c0a392f.png)

The official Modpack to the Minecraft project "Wonder SMP". The Server is a project of me and friends and ist **not** public. The goal of this modpack is to have a good vanilla like multiplayer experience with a few cool content mods that do not effect the gameplay to much.

Some main content mods are:
- Farmers Delight (Many new plants and cooking stations to cook delicious meals)
- Waystones (Many blocks to teleport around with making traveling around much easier)
- Fish of thieves (New cool Fishes and more fish related stuff)
- Ender Pack (Item with which the ender chest can be accessed with a keybind)
- Tool trims (Custumizability for your weapons & tools just like the armor trims in vanilla)
- Elytra trims (Armor trims can be used on elytra's)
- Elytra Slot (Elytra and chestplate can be worn at the same time)

The Modpack also aims to optimize the performance and gameplay experience with many quality of life and performacne mods.

## Features I want to do next

## Features I would like to do but dont know how
- Player & mob heads equipable in the "hat" trinket slot
- Ender pack equipable in the "back" trinket slot


**Alpha versions can be unstable sometimes**
